assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 13-16 show: '1. **Checkout the feature branch (target branch)**: git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' followed by '2. **Create the task branch from the feature branch**: git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 first, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 29: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column" --body "..."'. Line 31: 'The PR MUST specify --base TC-9005 to target the feature branch, not main.' Line 80: '**Base branch**: TC-9005 (the feature branch, NOT main)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 20-24: '**Create the task branch from the feature branch**: git checkout -b TC-9205' and 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID), created from TC-9005 (the feature branch / target branch).' Line 82: '**Head branch**: TC-9205 (the task branch)'. The task branch TC-9205 is clearly distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 38-42 explicitly list all three files: '1. **Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs**', '2. **Read migration/src/lib.rs**', '3. **Read entity/src/advisory.rs**'. file-2-description.md lines 13-15 also reference reading m0001_initial/mod.rs and entity/src/advisory.rs before creating the file.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 74-76: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "<message above>"'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 62-71 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows the type(scope): description format. The footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 8-9: 'The task description specifies **Target Branch: TC-9005**. This is a feature branch workflow -- TC-9205 is a sub-task incorporated by TC-9005. The PR must target the feature branch TC-9005, NOT main.' The plan has a dedicated 'Target Branch' section (line 7) that explicitly identifies TC-9005.
